description: Create en/msp/billing-settings.json with all keys for the 17 billing/tax settings components (~480 keys organized under tabs, general, quoting, tax, payments, serviceCategories, serviceTypes, serviceCatalog, products, quickAddService, quickAddProduct, clientTaxSettings, common, import, validation, errors, toast groups)
Update ROUTE_NAMESPACES in packages/core/src/lib/i18n/config.ts to add 'msp/billing-settings' to the '/msp/settings' entry
